description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a wooden exterior casing and a convex glass screen. The front features a circular CRT display with Cyrillic text, flanked by three rotary dials and a speaker grille on the lower right. On top, two metal V-shaped antenna rods and a circular loop antenna are mounted, with a black power cord and a red RCA connector trailing from the back. The rear panel has a green label and ventilation grilles, while the sides are smooth and rounded, showing the wood grain texture. The overall design is boxy and robust, typical of mid-20th-century analog televisions.
description: A vintage wooden television with a convex glass screen, rotary dials, and metal antennas on top.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the green label, ventilation grilles, and trailing power cord and RCA connector.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, rounded wooden casing and part of the antenna and cord.
description_view_2: Front view with the convex CRT screen, Cyrillic text, three rotary dials, and speaker grille.
description_view_3: Right side view with the wooden casing, visible power cord, and antenna base.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, brown wood, rectangular, matte finish, vintage style
attribute_control_button_layout: front right, vertical cluster of three rotary dials
